description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine with a bold, angular silhouette and a predominantly black exterior accented by red trim. The front features a large, colorful marquee labeled 'SMASH TV' above a CRT display screen, which is framed by illuminated bulbs and vibrant artwork. The control panel is equipped for two players, each with a joystick and multiple red and blue buttons, and is decorated with game-themed graphics. The side panels are adorned with a large, detailed illustration of a muscular, helmeted character wielding a futuristic weapon, set against a backdrop of red lights and a yellow 'W' emblem. The lower front section houses a coin slot and access panel, typical of arcade machines. The back panel is plain black, lacking any visible features or artwork.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with bold artwork, a colorful marquee, and a dual-player control panel. The sides feature a large illustrated character, while the front displays a vibrant screen and coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'SMASH TV' marquee, CRT screen, illuminated frame, dual-player control panel, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large illustrated character, red and yellow decorative elements, and the angled cabinet profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view, nearly identical to the left, with the same illustrated character and decorative elements.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a thick bezel and illuminated frame
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout with two joysticks and multiple red and blue buttons, decorated with game-themed graphics
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'SMASH TV' logo in bold red and yellow letters, surrounded by action-themed artwork and characters, with a vibrant and energetic style
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful illustration of a muscular, helmeted character holding a weapon, set against a backdrop of red lights and a yellow 'W' emblem; highly stylized and game-themed
